title: Qingdao, Shandong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Qingdao, Shandong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Qingdao is a city in Shandong with a population of 9,467,000. A coastal port city famous for Tsingtao beer, German colonial architecture, and beautiful beaches on the Yellow Sea.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
